prompt: My app uses blur effects (.ultraThinMaterial) extensively. A user with reduce transparency enabled can't read the content. How do I fix this?

assertions.rationale: Skill's system preferences section for reduce transparency

assertions.text: Replaces .ultraThinMaterial with solid Color(.systemBackground) when enabled
assertions.rationale: Skill provides exact replacement pattern for materials

assertions.text: Uses AnyShapeStyle or conditional for the SwiftUI type mismatch
assertions.rationale: Skill shows AnyShapeStyle pattern to bridge Material and Color types
